title: Pentagon designates Anthropic a supply chain risk | Reuters
full_text: March 5 (Reuters) - The Pentagon slapped a formal supply-chain risk designation on ​artificial intelligence lab Anthropic on Thursday, limiting use of a technology that a source said was being used for military operations in Iran. [...] The "supply-chain risk" ‌label, confirmed in a statement by Ant
